capability: JSON mode + GBNF grammar-constrained decode (decoder-side, model-agnostic)

harness.working_tree: WIN2METAL Phase 2 (Bucket A) validation on Apple M4 16GB. Binary is the FROZEN base build /Volumes/Untitled/camelid-base-28f224b (camelid v0.1.7-92-g28f224b, commit 28f224b); no src changes in this branch. Outputs salvaged under qa/capability/mac_*_out/<row>/.
harness.e2e_harness: qa/capability/* Metal harness; outputs under qa/capability/mac_*_out/llama-3.2-3b

evidence.summary: e2e behavioral battery on Metal (qa/capability/json_smoke.sh, Apple M4): response_format json_object -> JSON-grammar-constrained decoding (per-step logit mask). 4/4 json_object responses are valid JSON (every choices[0].message.content parses); the free-text control (no response_format) is unconstrained ("Hello!"). Constrained-decode mask drives correctly through the Metal decode path. Non-streaming. Evidence: qa/capability/mac_json_out/llama-3.2-3b/p1.json..p4.json, free.json.
